name: Haunted Service
short_description: A chilling psychological horror experience. Alone at home, you receive a cryptic message: "Congratulations! You got a haunted service." What starts as a prank quickly turns into a terrifying night as sinister events unfold. Will you survive until your parents return?
detailed_description:
Haunted Service is a short, immersive psychological horror experience where the familiar turns terrifying. One night, while home alone, you receive a chilling message from an unknown sender:

"Congratulations! You got a haunted service."

Before you can react, the power goes out. The entire house is swallowed by darkness, leaving only your flashlight to guide you. As you explore, strange occurrences escalate—doors creak shut on their own, eerie whispers echo in the silence, and something lurks in the darkness.

Will you make it through the night? Or will you become part of the Haunted Service?

Features

  • Short, intense horror experience with 10-20 mins playtime

  • Psychological horror atmosphere with eerie sounds and unsettling visuals

  • Tension-building events

  • Simple yet chilling story
